zh.Burgh by Sands, Cumberland, England: 英國英格蘭波藍德波 白 桑德斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph de Morville於1094年出生在英國英格蘭波藍德波 白 桑德斯時，他的父親Walter de Morville35歲，母親Rosselina de Bruis24歲。他與Eustacie of Cumberland結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1126年在英國諾圖波藍德享年32歲。

zh-hans.Burgh by Sands, Cumberland, England: 英国英格兰波藍德波 白 桑德斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph de Morville于1094年出生在英国英格兰波藍德波 白 桑德斯时，他的父亲Walter de Morville35岁，母亲Rosselina de Bruis24岁。他与Eustacie of Cumberland结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1126年在英国諾圖波藍德享年32岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Morville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Moorfield
meanings: English: locative name from Morville (Shrops), which is recorded as Mamerfeld in the 12th century, Momerefeld in 1255, and Morfelde in 1464.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph de Morville was born in 1094, in Burgh by Sands, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom, his father, Walter de Morville, was 35 and his mother, Rosselina de Bruis, was 24. He married Eustacie of Cumberland. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1126, in Northumberland, England, at the age of 32.

fr.Burgh by Sands, Cumberland, England: Burgh by Sands, Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph de Morville est né en 1094, à Burgh by Sands, Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Walter de Morville, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Rosselina de Bruis, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Eustacie of Cumberland. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1126, à Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 32 ans.

de.Burgh by Sands, Cumberland, England: Burgh by Sands, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph de Morville 1094 in Burgh by Sands, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter de Morville 35 und seine Mutter Rosselina de Bruis 24. Er hat Eustacie of Cumberland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1126 im Alter von 32 Jahren in Northumberland, England.

ja.Burgh by Sands, Cumberland, England: イギリスイギリスクウンバーランドブルグ ビー サンズ
ja.Riddesdale, Northumberland, England: イギリスノースウンバーランド
ja.lifeSummary: Ralph de Morvilleが1094年にイギリスイギリスクウンバーランドブルグ ビー サンズで生まれた時，父Walter de Morvilleは35歳，母Rosselina de Bruisは24歳であった。Eustacie of Cumberlandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1126年にイギリスノースウンバーランドで32歳で死去した。

ko.Burgh by Sands, Cumberland, England: 영국 잉글랜드 c벌랜드 버그h 비 샌드즈
ko.lifeSummary: Ralph de Morville(이)가 1094년 영국 잉글랜드 c벌랜드 버그h 비 샌드즈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter de Morville(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Rosselina de Bruis(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Eustacie of Cumberland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1126년 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 32세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Burgh by Sands, Cumberland, England: бург би сэндс, кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph de Morville родился в 1094 г. в местности бург би сэндс, кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Walter de Morville было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Rosselina de Bruis, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Eustacie of Cumberland. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1126 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 32 лет.
